## What does this PR do?

<!-- e.g. Adds the Buenos Aires BitDevs group to the map. -->

## Checklist

For a new city:

- [ ] Added an entry to `src/data/bitdevs.json`
- [ ] The entry includes `city`, `country`, `lat`, `lng` and `url`
- [ ] Coordinates are decimal degrees (city center)
- [ ] The list stays alphabetical by city
- [ ] The group is active and the link works

General:

- [ ] `bun run build` passes
